Hero.title: Welcome to Opour
Hero.subtitle: A charity organization aiming to serve the community and develop youth skills.

AboutPage.title: About Opour Organization
AboutPage.description: We are a charity organization seeking to empower youth and develop the community through education and development projects.

GoalsPage.title: Our Goals & Methodology
GoalsPage.description: We strive to achieve sustainable development through clear strategic goals focusing on education, health, and economic empowerment.

ContributePage.title: Contribute with Us
ContributePage.description: Join us as a volunteer or participate by donating to support our ongoing charitable projects.

ContactPage.title: Contact Us
ContactPage.description: We are here to answer all your inquiries. Contact us through the available channels.
